{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Sophara's technique
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's attack used [[soulfire]] and was on the level of an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
